description: Harness is a software delivery platform for CI/CD, GitOps, feature management, internal developer portals, security, and related DevOps workflows. It provides hosted platform services and supporting developer tooling for automating and managing those resources.
summary: Harness exposes a large authenticated REST API, a first-party `hc` CLI, and a first-party MCP server; all developer-facing surfaces use Harness-issued API tokens.
